title: Pom-hopper
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Hopper}} {{Species |image=[[File:Pom_hopper-wosfg.jpg]] |name=Pom-hopper
Male and female |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Non-sentient]] |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor=Orange and white |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor=Blue |distinctions= |lifespan= |origin=[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] |habitat=[[Swamp/Legends|Swamps]] |diet=[[Diet/Legends|Herbivore]] |language= }} The '''Pom-hopper''' was an animal from [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. An amphibious mammal, it was much more comfortable in the water than on land. ==Characteristics== [[File:Pom_hopper2-wosfg.jpg|left|thumb||150px|Sleeping Pom-hoppers.]] The Pom-hopper was a small, dainty herbivore native to the [[Gungan Swamp|swamps]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. They were very light, having slightly porous bones, and they had dog-like features. They were given their name because of their tendency to hop quickly across water covered in [[Pom petal|Pom Petals]]. Pom-hoppers required poms in their environment to live - without Pom pheromones, Pom-hoppers were even threatened with sterility. The very wide, webbed feet of the Pom-hoppers enabled them to leap among and balance on large Pom Petals. They had small tusks used for both defense and for cutting through blossoms. These creatures usually slept dangling underwater, breathing through their tube-like nostrils; they hid from predators in the same way.''[[The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide]]'' ==History== Soon after [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] transported Pom-hoppers and other animals to the moon of [[Ohma-D'un/Legends|Ohma-D'un]] to try and establish an ecosystem.[[Star Wars Episode I: The Gungan Frontier|''Star Wars'' Episode I: ''The Gungan Frontier'']] Most of the flora and fauna of Ohma-D'un, however, was destroyed during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] by [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]], at the [[Battle of Ohma-D'un]]. A female pom-hopper was found on a [[Unidentified moon (Ryloth system)|moon]] of the [[Ryloth system/Legends|Ryloth system]].[[Empire 21|''Empire'' 21]] ==Appearances== [[File:Pom_hopper3-woswfg.jpg|thumb|180px|Pom-hoppers Pom-hopping.]] *[[Star Wars Episode I: The Gungan Frontier|''Star Wars'' Episode I: ''The Gungan Frontier'']] {{1st}} *[[Empire 21|''Empire'' 21]] ==Sources== *''[[The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of pom-hoppers}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Pom-Hopper |nl=Pom-hopper }} [[Category:Creatures of Naboo]] [[Category:Herbivorous creatures]] [[Category:Mammals]] [[Category:Non-sentient species]] [[Category:Swamp creatures]]
